result.summary: Found 4 visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, ranging from a critical data display error to minor layout truncation issues.

issues.description: The 'Cop the Lot Megaways' game card displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13'. A jackpot amount should never be negative, indicating a data rendering or calculation bug.
issues.suggestion: Investigate the jackpot data feed for this game. Ensure values are validated before display and prevent negative numbers from being shown to users.

issues.description: Multiple game cards in the right column of the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section are visually cut off, showing only partial game title text (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...'). This makes the content unreadable and appears broken rather than a deliberate scroll indicator.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the horizontal scroll/carousel container clips cards cleanly with a clear visual affordance (e.g., a fade or arrow) to indicate scrollability, rather than abruptly cutting off text mid-word.

issues.description: The top navigation category bar is cut off on the right side, showing 'Hot Ga' instead of the full label (likely 'Hot Games'). This truncation makes the navigation item unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Implement a horizontal scroll on the navigation bar with a fade-out effect or visible scroll indicator so all nav items remain readable or users know more content exists.

issues.description: The bottom fixed navigation bar overlaps the bottom portion of the page content, potentially obscuring game tiles and interactive elements in the lower section of the scroll.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the main content area equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation bar to prevent content from being hidden underneath it.
